title: Plan After 12th
description: Understand entrance exams, courses, and career paths after Grade 12. JEE, NEET, CLAT, CUET, NID, CA Foundation — which one fits your goals?
target_audience: Grade 11-12 students planning after board exams
questions_it_answers: Which entrance exam should I take?
Can I do design without NID?
What are my options in commerce?
How do I choose between engineering and medical?
